reviewer.displayName: VSBDev — accessibility-and-rights reviewer operated via Codex

conflictOfInterest.details: No role, financial, or source-related conflict was identified. The accountable principal is also the PR author and operates this isolated review agent under the disclosed founding-stage policy; that permitted relationship is recorded here and is not represented as independently verified provenance.

evidenceChecked: content/010-orientation.md through content/100-synthesis.md: all ten declared scenes, semantic source order, headings, tables, alternatives, boundaries, and source notes
assessment.json#attemptPolicy-items-rubrics and content/090-assessment.md#answer-and-feedback-conditions: all four learner response paths, retry, remediation, and no-timer condition
references.json#sources: both declared uses, rights bases and evidence, exact source identity, CC BY 4.0 status, dated agentAccess records, and absence of human-only access

research/CONTENT-AUTHORING-EVIDENCE-2026-07-19.md at the declared locator and CONTENT-STANDARD.md: original-expression comparison against the lesson prose, cases, tables, questions, claims, and answer logic
ATTRIBUTION.md and lesson.json#authors-aiAssistance-license-thirdPartyAssets: contributor grant, accountable author, material authoring-agent disclosure, and declaration of no third-party assets

Rendered PREM-LPP-003 reader in isolated candidate build: keyboard-only scene/frame navigation, skip link, mobile navigation, contents drawer focus return, touch-sized route, and assessment submission/status feedback
Rendered PREM-LPP-003 at 1280x720, 640x720 (200% reflow proxy), and 375x667 with reduced motion: no page-level horizontal overflow and text-first table equivalents remained available
Rendered PREM-LPP-003 print document: 10/10 required scenes, 4/4 assessment items, 9 glossary entries, both references, attribution, one document h1, no duplicate IDs, and no overflow
Isolated candidate checks: npm run validate; EK_SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4273/site/ npm test; manual DOM and visible-render inspection; all candidate-pinned checks passed

Pack security and privacy inspection: no images, diagrams, structured molecules, media, third-party assets, raw HTML, scripts, unsafe TeX, remote embeds, executable content, secrets, or identifiable learner/patient data

findings.finding: The lesson is text-first and does not make a core relationship depend on sight, color, position, motion, sound, hovering, dragging, or timing. Both instructional tables use meaningful column headers and are paired with ordered prose or an explicit non-tabular route that preserves the planning operation and causal relationships. Keyboard, narrow-screen, reduced-motion, and print inspection preserved those equivalents without page-level lateral overflow.

The four assessment paths preserve equivalent participation: the single-choice item uses a labelled fieldset and keyboard-operable radios, the three constructed responses use programmatically labelled textareas, feedback is exposed as a polite status after an attempt, retakes are enabled, and no timer or presentation-style score is imposed. The lesson also permits typing, handwriting, dictation, speech-to-text, or another text-producing route without changing the reasoning criteria.

The rights ledger is defensible within project policy. Both sources are repository-owned CC BY 4.0 materials used as factual or project-standard references, carry dated checked-no-agent-restriction-found records, and were accessible to this review without a human-only restriction. Comparison against the declared source passages found independent lesson organization, cases, tables, questions, and answer logic rather than copied source expression. Original lesson content is granted under CC BY 4.0, authoring provenance is complete and internally consistent, and no third-party asset, quotation, dataset extraction, redistribution, or adaptation is declared or present.

The cases are explicitly fictional and contain no identifiable learner or patient information. The lesson states its educational and non-clinical boundary, requires no personal health data or physical performance, and contains no active or remotely loaded lesson material. Validation and manual inspection found no unsafe path, script, event handler, raw HTML, remote embed, executable notebook, TeX command, SVG, media, secret, or copyrighted answer-bank content.

limitations: This is an accessibility-and-rights policy review, not legal advice. Copyright, privacy, consent, contract, trademark, database, and accessibility obligations can vary by jurisdiction; no court, regulator, counsel, or source owner confirmed the conclusions.

Accessibility evidence used semantic-source inspection, headless Chrome, keyboard-only interaction, reduced-motion emulation, desktop and narrow/reflow viewports, print rendering, and visible screenshot inspection. No representative screen-reader user or disabled learner participated, and no unavailable PDF, EPUB, DOCX, JATS, or other non-web exporter was claimed or tested.

The agent and author provenance fields are disclosed and attested strings whose internal consistency was checked; provider, model, version, run identity, and independence were not cryptographically or externally verified. This review does not claim quorum or merge readiness.

The instructions digest covers a labelled concatenation of the exact user review task, repository AGENTS.md, and the selected accessibility-rights SKILL.md. It excludes hidden platform instructions and reference materials read as evidence. Existing review findings and adjudication text were not read or used.
